curation.synopsis: Sentenced to a Death Oath for the Vespasian-tactic deployment on Tarsis Ultra, Captain Uriel Ventris and his battle-brother Pasanius Lysane are dispatched into the Eye of Terror to Medrengard, the daemon-forge-world of the Iron Warriors Traitor Legion. Their penance-mission is to locate and return a sample from the Daemonculaba — the horrific biological-industrial complex the Iron Warriors use to incubate Astartes-grade Chaos warriors. Stripped of regimental support, hunted by Iron Warriors Warsmith Honsou and harried by daemon engines and the corrupted infrastructure of a Chaos planet, Ventris and Pasanius link up with Ardaric Vaanes and his Lords of the Unholy Host — a band of fallen Space Marines living rough in Medrengard's wastes — and fight a journey-procedural through the daemon-forge to extract the sample. The novel's register is horror-procedural: corrupted flesh, half-living machinery, the slow attrition of two Loyalist Astartes alone on a Chaos planet. Closes with Ventris and Pasanius returning to Macragge changed but vindicated; Honsou survives the encounter and is permanently set as Ventris's personal antagonist for the remainder of the saga.
